displayNameZh: 四技能展示：Superpowers、shadcn/ui Skills、OWASP、Trail of Bits
summary: Yt Skill Showcase component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「四技能展示：Superpowers、shadcn/ui Skills、OWASP、Trail of Bits」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-skill-showcase/src/YtSkillShowcase.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtSkillShowcase` and `ytSkillShowcaseDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Skill Showcase Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-skill-showcase to my project. Preserve the exported YtSkillShowcaseProps API and register the YtSkillShowcase composition with the default props.
